title: Partner
description: An actor in the European edge & MEC continuum.

slug.description: Unique id; file name without .json (a-z, 0-9, hyphen).

name.description: Display name of the organisation or project.

cluster.description: Role: telco=MEC & Telco Edge, platform=Edge Software Platforms, orch=Cloud-Native & Orchestration, hardware=Edge Hardware & Silicon, infra=Cloud & Sovereign Infra, std=Standards & Initiatives.

layer.description: Continuum position: 1=Regional/Sovereign Cloud, 2=Edge Cloud (Aggregation), 3=Access/Network Edge (MEC), 4=Device/Far Edge.

country.description: Country/region code, e.g. DE, FR, EU, INT.

tag.description: Short label, e.g. 'CNCF' or 'DE - Rancher' (~22 chars max).

lede.description: One sentence shown in the tooltip and as the intro.

facts.description: 2-4 concise bullet points in your own words.
